title: Explain thread safety in Java. How can you ensure it?

answers.junior: Thread safety means code works correctly when accessed by multiple threads. Use synchronization to ensure it.
answers.middle: Thread safety is achieved by controlling access to shared data. Use synchronized, locks, or atomic classes.
answers.senior: Ensure thread safety with proper synchronization, immutable objects, and java.util.concurrent tools. Avoid race conditions and deadlocks. Analyze code for shared state.
answers.tricky: Use lock-free algorithms, atomic classes, and concurrent collections. Prefer immutability and stateless design. Analyze thread interactions and test for concurrency issues.
